race.comment: Looks a handy maiden but a bit to work through, albeit a few key scratchings have altered the field. CYBERSECURITY (1) is a nicely bred colt by Home Affairs out of multiple Group winner Tulip who kicks off for the Hayes yard. Wary and will pay to watch the betting with Mott on from a good draw. SAINT WILLO (4) is a colt by St Mark's Basilica for the Hayes yard who has also been jumping out well and has strong claims, respecting. SECRET ALLIANCE (14) is a Microphone filly for the Stokes yard who cruised to win a recent jumpout and looks ready to go, expect she takes some beating as well. THE PALLET MAN (7) is a gelding by Admire Mars on debut who has won a couple of jumpouts and has claims.
